subject: Correction - Fermi/GBM trigger 160523919 is a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

The questionable nature of the burst reported in GCN 19455 was suppose to refer to 
Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 485697936/160523504
at 12:05:32.79 UT on 23 May 2016. GBM trigger 485733821/160523919 is 
in fact a GRB.
